---
title: "10. 认识分辨率与视角转换"
subtitle: "Epistemic Resolution and Perspective Scaling"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 10
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "The formal core here is that coarser and finer observations disclose different but related truths, and no single resolution captures the object completely. Inverse-limit language models this directly...."
---

**Chapters:** 17, 22, 25, 32  
**Omega Directions:** `modular-tower-inverse-limit`, `rate-distortion-information-theory`, `spectral-theory`

{{< include articles/category_10_epistemic_resolution_perspective_scaling.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_10_epistemic_resolution_perspective_scaling Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_epistemic_resolution_perspective_scaling_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_epistemic_resolution_perspective_scaling_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_10_epistemic_resolution_perspective_scaling_infographic.png)

[Back to Zhuangzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
